Suggestion.title: Suggestion
Suggestion.description: Represents a suggestion, complaint, or idea submitted by a student to Cavendish University management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Suggestion entity.

studentName.description: The name of the student submitting the suggestion. Optional for anonymous submissions.

studentRegistrationNumber.description: The registration number of the student submitting the suggestion. Optional for anonymous submissions.

departmentId.description: Reference to the Department where the suggestion is directed or originated. (Relationship: Department 1:N Suggestion)

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category of the suggestion (e.g., Complaint, Recommendation). (Relationship: Category 1:N Suggestion)

title.description: A brief summary or title of the suggestion.

message.description: The detailed message or content of the suggestion.

priority.description: The priority level assigned to the suggestion (Low, Medium, High).

isAnonymous.description: Indicates whether the student chose to submit the suggestion anonymously.

submissionDateTime.description: The date and time when the suggestion was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the suggestion (e.g., Pending, Reviewed, Resolved).

resolvedDateTime.description: The date and time when the suggestion was marked as resolved by an administrator. Null if not resolved.

adminNotes.description: Internal notes added by administrators regarding the suggestion.

Department.title: Department
Department.description: Represents a university department to which suggestions can be related.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Department entity.

name.description: The official name of the department (e.g., 'Computer Science').

description.description: A brief description of the department.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a predefined category for suggestions (e.g., 'Complaint', 'Recommendation').

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the suggestion category (e.g., 'Complaint', 'Facilities Issue').

description.description: A brief description or definition of the category.

definition.description: Stores information about university departments. Documents are read-only for all authenticated users and writeable only by administrators. Includes denormalized 'name' for easier display in suggestions.

params.name: departmentId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific university department.

definition.description: Stores predefined categories for suggestions (e.g., 'Complaint', 'Recommendation'). Documents are read-only for all authenticated users and writeable only by administrators. Includes denormalized 'name' for easier display in suggestions.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific suggestion category.

definition.description: Stores all student suggestions, complaints, and ideas. This collection supports global viewing for all authenticated users. For authorization independence, each document includes an 'ownerId' (the UID of the submitting student) if 'isAnonymous' is false, allowing the owner to manage their own non-anonymous suggestions without hierarchical lookups. It also contains 'status', 'departmentId', and 'categoryId' for efficient querying and filtering.

params.name: suggestionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific student suggestion.

definition.description: Grants administrator privileges. A document exists here for each user ID (UID) that has admin rights. This enables Database-Backed Access Control (DBAC) using existence checks, ensuring authorization independence and simplified security rules for admin actions.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the user designated as an administrator.
